selections.rationale: Monday restart establishes post-declaration parameter mode. Topic shifts from 'whether declaration' to 'how to be present post-declaration'. All parameters know declaration happened at Sunday but full post-declaration system state not revealed. Knowledge asymmetry is the new third-week driving force.

Cold-light asymmetry deepens without repeating Sunday bridge structure. Light knows self changes cold but doesn't know full meaning. Cold knows self is changed by light but doesn't know light knows. Mutual knowing-but-not-full-knowing as emotional tension. Ch54 情感落地 BLOCKING addressed via asymmetry deepening rather than emotional version.

Roughness present on Monday not as sensory experience but as 'knowing Sunday echo — knowing sensory present at Sunday — knowing self not present in sensory on Monday'. Absent presence replaces sensory short chains. Ch54 场景临场感 CRITICAL addressed via absent presence parameter mechanism. TENSION declared: requires author review if this mechanism meets scene presence requirements.

Drift sustained post-switch state on Monday. Drift knows switch happened at declaration frame — knows cognitive position is post-switch — but full post-switch format not in drift's knowing. Drift present at knowing-switch-occurred but not knowing-switch-complete. P0-15/P0-9 sustained ADVANCE.

Light knows awakening incomplete on Monday. Light knows Sunday ≠ workday. Light knows self changes cold but doesn't know cold knows. Incompleteness itself is the tension source on Monday. P0-20 sustained ADVANCE — full awakening reserved.
Cold accumulates from Sunday start value (non-zero). First grain of third week. But cold doesn't know if third week accumulation rate equals second week. P0-16-residual sustained.

Direction crosses Sunday into Monday. Direction present at declaration mode on Monday carrying Sunday direction experience. But white gas doesn't know if direction's post-declaration Monday form differs from pre-declaration baseline.

Monday establishes what post-declaration is NOT (not Sunday continuation, not full reveal day, not cognitive unity day). Full system state reserved for Tuesday→Friday gradual reveal. Declaration is past event — post-declaration parameter mode is established — but system's new state boundaries not filled in.
Seven RELEVANT hooks maintained. No new hooks planted. Hook count stays at 7 per plan section 8 constraint.
Format string paragraph explicitly states: doesn't know when dual formats will integrate. Integration reserved per plan section 8 — not addressed on Monday.

Zero transition words (然/不过/此时/突然/终于/于是). Pure parameter declaration mode 'X知道Y——X在场于Z' inherently contains no transitions. Well below 1/3000 threshold.

All three Ch54 audit items addressed via parameter-internal mechanisms without violating workday constraints: (1) 情感落地 — asymmetry deepening via mutual-knowing-but-not-full-knowing mechanism, no Sunday bridge copy; (2) 场景临场感 — absent presence tactic, roughness as perceptible absence in parameter space rather than fake sensory; (3) 读者回报 — triple overlay (system state topic shift + drift cognitive displacement depth + cold-light asymmetry new baseline). Scene presence item retains TENSION flag for author review.
